description: Implement a video player in the VideoPlayerApp that plays the video file located at 'app/src/main/res/raw/promo_video.mp4' using the Jetpack Media3 ExoPlayer library. The application must include the required media3-exoplayer and media3-ui dependencies in 'app/build.gradle.kts', a full-screen 'androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView' in 'activity_main.xml', and a properly managed ExoPlayer instance in 'MainActivity.kt' that handles initialization, playback of the local resource, and lifecycle-aware resource release.
